message:
feat(mux): forward key_up events through mux client to remote panes (T9.2)

Key-up events were silently dropped for mux client panes because the
key_up method on ClientPane was a TODO no-op stub. This wires up the
full round-trip for key-release and modifier-release behavior:

- Define SendKeyUp PDU (ID 73) in codec with pane_id + KeyEvent, register
  in pdu! macro, mark as user-input-class for serial ordering
- Add rpc!(key_up, SendKeyUp, UnitResponse) client stub
- Replace ClientPane TODO no-op with async task forwarding SendKeyUp PDU
- Add Pdu::SendKeyUp match arm in session handler to dispatch to pane

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
